g.text: State Machine: SIMD strlen Execution Path

tr.td: Prevents reading garbage before str start

div.p: Note: SSE2 _mm_load_si128 requires 16-byte alignment. Misaligned access via _mm_loadu_si128 is avoided to prevent page faults on the very end of a mapped region.

text.tspan: **Logic:** Misaligned pointers risk crossing page boundaries on 128-bit loads.
- No page boundary crossing possible within a single load.
`*str == '\0'` detected during initial scalar check or prologue.
